texto: You still have friends who love you. It does not matter how many you have. All that matters is that someone thinks about you. A friend who cares for you. That is all you need. Do not commit suicide and do not cut just because someone does not say they think about you. I had the same problems until I found out this. Some people do not have anything and are raped and or killed and no one notices because no one cares. You have people. They are just too nervous to confront you. You all have someone who loves you. Do not hide your real self from the world. Let your voice be heard.
explicacao: Citação de Neo Dallmeyer sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “You still have friends who love you. It does not matter how many you have. All that matters is th…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, love em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e termino.
